title: mocha@3.0.1 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [mocha](https://www.npmjs.com/package/mocha) just published its new version 3.0.1.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency mocha
New version 3.0.1
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As mocha is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 5 commits . - [`6a401c7`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/6a401c74c8f990e9c9d74e826bb56c449e1c1c3b) Release v3.0.1 - [`3b967ba`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/3b967baa7585f9815c25412e335815cd954ebda9) update CHANGELOG.md; rebuild [ci skip] - [`8afe661`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/8afe66169f4fe89124c1785c3f029fd3d4f1dcb9) Merge pull request #2411 from not-an-aardvark/2406-nested-describe-only - [`8cae7a3`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/8cae7a34f0b6eafeb16567beb8852b827cc5956b) fix nested describe.only suites; closes #2406 - [`4ad372b`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/4ad372b9850d29ec8f65567b1a1f257943deb5a6) update date in CHANGELOG.md [ci skip] See the [full diff](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/compare/e8cda7399efe1f8f1da97d8295ad323f9c64c8aa...6a401c74c8f990e9c9d74e826bb56c449e1c1c3b). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
